name: node-spdx-license-ids
title: node-spdx-license-ids
description:
List of SPDX license identifiers
A list of SPDX license identifiers. The SPDX License List is a list of
commonly found licenses and exceptions used for open source and other
collaborative software.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-spdx-license-ids because List of SPDX license identifiers.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-spdx-license-ids as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-spdx-license-ids with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-spdx-license-ids --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
